custom_css: @media screen and (min-width: 425px) {.utility-bar {position: fixed; top: 0; height: auto; width: 100vw; }}

@media screen and (min-width: 780px) {.header__icons {margin-right: 37%; } .header__search {margin-left: 37%; } nav > ul > li:first-child {margin-left: auto; } nav > ul > li:last-child {margin-right: auto; } div > header > nav > ul > li > div > ul > li {padding: 30px 15px; } li.gm-item.gm-hidden-mobile.gm-grid-item.gmcol-3.gm-image-2, .gm-image-2 {padding-top: 0px; }}
